services.label: What we offer
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to performance upgrades — serving Montreal and the West Island.
services.subtitleFull: From routine maintenance to performance upgrades — professional automotive services in Montreal and the West Island.
services.bannerText: Book your appointment online — serving Montreal & the West Island
services.localSeo: Autoelite is your trusted auto repair shop in Montreal. We proudly serve drivers from Vaudreuil-Dorion, Pointe-Claire, Dorval, Beaconsfield, Kirkland, and throughout the West Island. From oil changes and brake service to full engine rebuilds and performance upgrades — we do it all with quality parts and honest pricing.

oil.title: Oil Change & Maintenance
oil.desc: Regular oil changes, filter replacements, and preventive maintenance to keep your vehicle running smoothly.

brake.title: Brake Service
brake.desc: Brake pad and rotor replacement, fluid flush, and full brake system diagnostics and repair.

diagnostic.title: Vehicle Diagnostics
diagnostic.desc: Computer diagnostics and expert troubleshooting to identify check engine lights and drivability issues.

suspension.title: Suspension & Steering
suspension.desc: Shocks, struts, ball joints, tie rods, and alignment services for a smooth, safe ride.

engine.title: Engine Repairs
engine.desc: From minor tune-ups to major engine work — handled with precision and quality parts.

performance.title: Performance Upgrades
performance.desc: Tuning, intake and exhaust upgrades, and performance parts installation for serious power.

tire.title: Tire Mounting & Balancing
tire.desc: New tire installation, balancing, rotation, and tire repair. We source the right tires for your vehicle.

inspection.title: Vehicle Inspections
inspection.desc: Pre-purchase and safety inspections so you know exactly what shape your vehicle is in.

about.label: About Us
about.heroTitle: A Father-and-Sons Shop Built on Trust
about.heroSubtitle: Family-owned and proudly serving Montreal with over 35 years of experience.
about.intro1: At Autoelite, cars have always been part of our family. As a father-and-sons business, we've built this shop on shared values: hard work, honesty, attention to detail, and pride in doing the job right.
about.intro2: We know that bringing your vehicle to a repair shop is about more than service — it's about trust. That's why we work hard to give every customer the kind of experience we would want for our own family: clear communication, honest advice, and quality repairs that last.
about.intro3: From diagnostics and maintenance to repairs and performance work, we're proud to serve Montreal with the personal care and commitment that only a family business can offer.
about.badgeDesc: For over 35 years, our family's passion for cars and commitment to quality work has helped shape everything we do.
about.story1: Autoelite was built on a shared passion between father and sons — a passion for cars, hard work, and building something meaningful together.
about.story2: What started with years of hands-on automotive experience grew into a family-run business founded on trust, pride, and a commitment to quality. For us, this shop is not just about repairing vehicles — it's about carrying on a standard of work and customer care that reflects our family name.
about.story3: Working together as a family allows us to bring a different kind of service to the shop. We understand the value of relationships, loyalty, and treating people properly. That mindset carries into every repair, every diagnostic, and every conversation we have with our customers.
about.story4: From routine maintenance to complex repairs and performance work, we take the time to properly inspect, diagnose, and repair every vehicle with care and precision.
about.trust1: As a family business, trust is at the center of everything we do.
about.trust2: We know how important it is to find a repair shop you can rely on, and we never take that for granted. Our team believes in being transparent, explaining repairs clearly, and helping customers understand exactly what their vehicle needs — and just as importantly, what it doesn't.
about.trustBold: No unnecessary work. No pressure. No shortcuts. Just honest service, quality workmanship, and the kind of care you expect from a business that puts its family name behind every job.
about.facility1: Our workshop is equipped to handle a wide range of automotive services, including diagnostics, maintenance, repairs, and performance upgrades.
about.facility2: We use modern diagnostic tools and professional-grade equipment to ensure every repair is completed accurately and efficiently. But beyond the tools, what really sets our shop apart is the pride we take in our work and the family values behind it.
about.facility3: Whether it's a daily driver, a family vehicle, or a performance car, every job is approached with the same level of attention, care, and professionalism.
about.approach1: At Autoelite, we believe in doing more than just fixing the obvious problem.
about.approach2: When a vehicle comes in for a specific issue, we take the time to inspect it thoroughly and look at the bigger picture. Our goal is to make sure the vehicle leaves not only repaired, but safe, reliable, and properly looked after.
about.approach3: That mindset comes from years of experience and from the values we've built as a father-and-sons business: do the work properly, communicate honestly, and treat every customer with respect.
about.approach4: That's how we build long-term relationships — and that's the standard we bring to every vehicle that comes through our shop.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to experience the Autoelite difference?
about.ctaSubtitle: A father-and-sons business with 35+ years of experience. Montreal's trusted shop for automotive repair and service.

fleet.label: Fleet Services
fleet.title: Keep Your Fleet on the Road
fleet.subtitle: Reliable maintenance, priority scheduling, and preventative programs for commercial and fleet vehicles in Montreal.
fleet.servicesSubtitle: Tailored solutions for businesses that depend on their vehicles.
fleet.whySubtitle: We understand that fleet downtime costs money. That's why we offer dedicated fleet scheduling, transparent reporting, and consistent quality across every vehicle.
fleet.ctaTitle: Ready to streamline your fleet maintenance?
fleet.ctaSubtitle: Contact us for a custom fleet service plan.

maintenance.title: Fleet Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Scheduled oil changes, brake inspections, tire rotations, and preventative care to keep your entire fleet running at peak reliability.

commercial.title: Commercial Vehicle Servicing
commercial.desc: Light-duty trucks, vans, and commercial vehicles. We handle the unique needs of commercial fleets with the same quality and precision as our consumer service.

priority.title: Priority Scheduling
priority.desc: Your fleet can't afford downtime. We offer priority scheduling for fleet clients so your vehicles get in, get serviced, and get back on the road fast.

preventative.title: Preventative Maintenance Programs
preventative.desc: Custom maintenance schedules tailored to your fleet size and usage. Reduce unexpected breakdowns and control operating costs with planned service intervals.
